metadata.institution: MSAJCE — Mohamed Sathak A.J. College of Engineering
metadata.purpose: Provides complete, pre-built group summaries for batch and department-based queries. Each chunk is a self-contained answer to a list query, preventing the retrieval engine from needing to scan multiple atomic rows.
metadata.strategy: Pre-Aggregated List Chunks — one chunk per group (batch year or department)

chunks.context: Complete list of all 97 students who received alumni scholarships from MSAJCE Alumni Association between 2019 and 2026. Total amount sponsored: Rs. 37,94,972.
